title: Identity Hunt Foundation
description: Shared identity-hunt building blocks for domain and family packs.

parameters.name: tenant
parameters.description: Tenant, business unit, or environment selector.

parameters.name: focus_ip
parameters.description: Optional IP address or IP fragment to prioritize.

telemetry_requirements.description: Interactive and non-interactive sign-ins with device, location, and risk context.
SIEM visibility that can pivot suspicious identity events into downstream activity.

blind_spots: Identity activity occurring in unmanaged SaaS or identity providers outside the configured connectors will not appear in this foundation.
notes: Foundation packs are meant to be composed into domain or family packs rather than used as the final operator-facing entry point.
